backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing diagram state management with user profiles, named diagrams (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels, images), and access control using mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three completed features: adding six Lucide React security icons, implementing drag-and-drop functionality, and updating icon type definitions in AttackPathToolbar.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, utilities, and configuration for the threat hunting portal with attack path visualization.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for a security-focused dark blue/teal palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Threat Hunting Portal application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/index.ts: Utility snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage for exporting canvas elements to PNG images.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication flow, profile setup modal, and route protection requiring login for all pages.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Main canvas component for attack path visualization handling icon placement, connections, drawings, text labels, images, drag-and-drop, resizing, multi-selection with drag-to-select, and mode switching between place/connect/draw.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: Arrow connector component rendering rotatable lines between icons with arrowheads, selection highlighting, and click handling for attack path diagrams.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders draggable icons for attack path diagrams, supporting both image assets and Lucide React icons for security-related elements (backdoor, phishing, cloud, firewall, router, scheduled task).
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a toolbar for attack path diagram editing with icon selection, drawing tools (pencil, arrow, text, eraser), undo/save/load/clear actions, text formatting controls, and image upload functionality with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation (Reports, Attack Path, New Report), user profile display, conditional hero banner on homepage, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Dialog for loading saved attack path diagrams with a scrollable list showing diagram metadata (icon/connection/text counts, last modified date) and delete functionality with confirmation.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when user is authenticated, clearing identity and query cache on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login interface using Internet Identity authentication with security-themed branding and loading states.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable combobox for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques with support for custom technique entries, displaying technique IDs, names, and descriptions with badge UI.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that triggers PDF generation for threat reports using the pdfGenerator utility, showing loading state during generation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name for profile setup, with form validation and submission handling via useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: Dialog component for saving attack path diagrams with a name input field, handling save/cancel actions and loading states.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Static data file containing MITRE ATT&CK technique definitions organized by tactics (Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, Privilege Escalation) with IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, handling authentication state, identity changes, and initializing access control with optional admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Custom hook managing attack path diagram state including placed icons, connections, drawings, text labels, images, drawing tools, selection state, and undo/redo history with a 50-state limit.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook for deleting diagram states by ID, invalidating the allDiagrams query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend, enabled only when the actor is initialized.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile, with custom loading state handling that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a specific diagram state by ID, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (getAllReports, getReport, saveReport, deleteReport) with local DetailedReport type definitions, though all backend methods are currently disabled/unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile via the actor and invalidates the currentUserProfile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a diagram state by name via the actor and invalidates both diagramState and allDiagrams query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using oklch color space, including primary, secondary, destructive, and chart color definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers for React Query and ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Main page component for creating attack path diagrams with canvas, toolbar, and state management for icons, connections, drawings, text labels, and images, including save/load/clear functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component with a form for creating threat hunt reports, handling submission via useSaveReport mutation and navigating back on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a single threat hunt report with sections for executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, affected systems, remediation, and recommendations, plus PDF download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React component that displays a table of threat hunting reports with MITRE ATT&CK analysis, supporting view, delete, and PDF export actions. Uses TanStack Router for navigation and React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2canvas library type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jsPDF library type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility function that generates a printable HTML document in a new window for threat hunting reports, including metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and findings sections with styled formatting.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with sidebar/chart colors, custom animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite configuration for React app with path aliases, environment variable injection for canister IDs, proxy setup for local API calls, and build optimizations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for a cybersecurity attack path visualizer, documenting completed features for Lucide React icon toolbar with drag-and-drop functionality and pending integration requirements.
